mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You can’t change your membership plan while your current one is active.

If you would like to change to a different membership plan, please cancel
the automatic renewal for your current plan.

Then, once your current plan has expired and your membership is no longer
active, you can purchase your preferred membership plan.

TextInfos.Text: You can’t change your membership plan while your current one is active.
If you would like to change to a different membership plan, please cancel
the automatic renewal for your current plan.
Then, once your current plan has expired and your membership is no longer
active, you can purchase your preferred membership plan.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
・ Product Details and Quantity
Premium Battle Pass ×1
Purchasing a Premium Battle Pass lets you receive additional rewards when the level of your
Battle Pass increases.
For more specifics about these rewards, please check the Battle Pass screen, which can be
accessed from the Gym screen.

A Premium Battle Pass remains valid for the duration of the season.
After the season ends, the pass will expire. You can purchase a new Premium Battle Pass for
the next season. To see the specific dates of a season, please check the Battle Pass screen,
which can be accessed from the Gym screen.

Note: Rewards that are identical to items you already have in your inventory may be
converted to VP.

At the time of purchasing a Premium Battle Pass, you’ll receive the Premium Battle Pass
rewards for all of the Battle Pass levels that you’ve attained up until that point.

Note: Rewards obtained with the Premium Battle Pass may become available to purchase
from the Shop screen or to obtain in some other way at a later date.


・ Pricing
To see the price of this product, please select Back to return to the previous screen and
check the information there.


・ Sales Period
You can purchase a Premium Battle Pass up until the end of the season during which that pass
is being sold.
Only one Premium Battle Pass may be purchased per sales period.

If you attempt to purchase a Premium Battle Pass right before the end of the sales period, it’s
possible that the transaction may not go through due to payment issues on the platform.

Please ensure that you have sufficient time before the end of the sales period when you
purchase a Premium Battle Pass.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
1. Membership Benefits (pricing and other details)
Two types of membership plans are available: a 1-month plan and a 12-month plan.
To see the prices of these products, please select Back to return to the previous screen and
check the information there.

You can receive the following benefits by purchasing a membership, depending on the region.

・ The capacity of your Box will increase by 1,000 Pokémon.
・ The number of Battle Teams you can use will increase by 15.
・ Membership-exclusive missions will be unlocked (applicable missions can be seen on the
   Missions screen).
・ Membership-exclusive battle songs will be unlocked (applicable battle songs will be
   indicated by a gold label and can be seen on the screen for changing battle songs).

You can receive these benefits immediately after purchasing a membership.

If you cancel your membership, you will still be able to receive these benefits until your
membership period expires. Please note that you will not receive a refund for canceling
your membership.


2. Automatic Membership Renewal
After you become a member, your membership will be renewed upon the renewal date of
your purchased plan, and you will be charged automatically.
Note: Please be aware that your membership period may differ depending on your method
of purchase.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Membership periods for players using the Nintendo Switch version of the game
with automatic renewal active:
1-month plan: Until the same time on the 30th day after purchase.
12-month plan: Until the same time on the 365th day after purchase (where permitted).

For example:
If you purchase a 1-month (30-day) plan at 3:00 p.m. on January 1, 2026, the plan will
automatically be renewed for 30 more days at 3:00 p.m. on January 31, 2026.

If you purchase a 12-month (365-day) plan at 5:00 a.m. on January 1, 2026, the plan will
automatically be renewed for 12 more months at 5:00 a.m. on January 1, 2027.


Membership periods for players using the mobile version of the game with automatic
renewal active:
1-month plan: Until 1 month after purchase (i.e. until the same time on the same day of the
following month).
12-month plan: Until 1 year after purchase (i.e. until the same time on the same day of the
following year). (Where permitted)
If you purchase a membership at the end of the month, and the equivalent day does not exist
during the following month or year, your membership will instead be renewed at the same
time on the final day of the relevant month.

For example:
If you purchase a 1-month plan at 3:00 p.m. on January 1, 2026, the plan will
automatically be renewed for 1 more month at 3:00 p.m. on February 1, 2026.

If you purchase a 12-month plan at 5:00 a.m. on January 1, 2026, the plan will
automatically be renewed for 12 more months at 5:00 a.m. on January 1, 2027
(where permitted).
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

As soon as your membership expires, you will stop being able to receive the benefits from
your membership plan.
Note: Automatic membership renewal may not work in certain regions and locations
depending on the age of the player.
Note: When playing the mobile version, please log in with a device that is compatible with
the platform used to purchase your membership. The automatic renewal of your membership
may not be reflected properly if you log in with a device that uses a different platform.

If you do not want your membership to renew automatically, please cancel the automatic
renewal on the platform you used to become a member:
・ at least 48 hours before the end of the current membership period for the Nintendo Switch
   version, and
・ at least 24 hours before the end of the current membership period for the mobile version.

For more guidance on how to cancel automatic renewal, please check the official customer
support site for Pokémon Champions.


3. Membership Cancellation Information
If you cancel your membership, you will no longer be able to receive the benefits from your
membership plan, and certain features of the game will change as below.

・ The capacity of your Box will revert to 30 slots, plus any additional slots earned by
   other means.
・ Any Pokémon that can no longer fit in your Box will be locked. You won’t be able to do the
   following with locked Pokémon.
     1) Register them to Battle Teams
     2) Have them take part in battles
     3) Train them
     4) Change their battle names
     5) Change their titles
     6) Issue or use Team IDs for any teams they are on

・ You can do the following with locked Pokémon.
     1) Return them to Roster Ranch
     2) Send them back to Pokémon HOME
     3) Add them to your favorites or unfavorite them
     4) Give them labels or remove labels from them

・ Even if you return recruited Pokémon to Roster Ranch or send visiting Pokémon back
   to Pokémon HOME, your locked Pokémon will not be unlocked to fill the newly-created
   spaces in your Box.
・ Pokémon that were permanently recruited in Pokémon Champions and that are currently
   eligible to take part in Ranked Battles will be the last in line to be locked.
・ Locked Pokémon will be unlocked as soon as you purchase a membership again.

・ The number of Battle Teams you can use will decrease by 15.

・ You will no longer be able to receive rewards from membership-exclusive missions
   (applicable missions can be seen on the Missions screen).

・ You will no longer be able to select membership-exclusive battle songs (applicable
   battle songs will be indicated by a gold label and can be seen on the screen for
   changing battle songs).


4. Platform Used to Enroll in Membership
If you are using the same account to play the Nintendo Switch version and the mobile version
of Pokémon Champions, you can enroll in membership from either version but not both at the
same time.
You can claim membership benefits regardless of which version of the game you used to
become a member, whether it is the Nintendo Switch version or the mobile version.


5. Other Information
・ If you reinstall the app due to a change of device or other reason, please link your game to
   the relevant account and log in with the account you want to have associated with your
   membership before you purchase the membership.
・ Payment issues on the platform may cause errors in processing your membership enrollment.
   Please do not close the app while payments are being processed.
・ If you are playing the mobile version of Pokémon Champions and you are not able to claim
   your membership benefits despite having purchased a membership, please try selecting the
   following options, starting from the Gym screen.
   Shop > Premium Shop > Membership > Restore Past Transactions
